result:
All 11 tests pass.

**Summary of changes:**

- `src/Program.vb` — full MiniGit v1 implementation: `init`, `add`, `commit -m`, `log` commands with the MiniHash FNV-1a variant algorithm
- `Minigit.vbproj` — added `<RemoveIntegerChecks>true</RemoveIntegerChecks>` (disables VB.NET's default overflow checking so 64-bit unsigned multiplication wraps correctly) and `<PublishSingleFile>true</PublishSingleFile>` (produces a truly self-contained single binary so the copied `minigit` executable finds its runtime)
